mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reading_progress ( user_id, book_id, current_page, total_pages, current_position, percentage_completed, reading_time_minutes, status, is_favorite, notes, started_at, completed_at, last_read_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{bookId}, #{currentPage}, #{totalPages}, #{currentPosition}, #{percentageCompleted}, #{readingTimeMinutes}, #{status}, #{isFavorite}, #{notes}, #{startedAt}, #{completedAt}, NOW() ) ON CONFLICT (user_id, book_id) DO UPDATE SET current_page = EXCLUDED.current_page, total_pages = EXCLUDED.total_pages, current_position = EXCLUDED.current_position, percentage_completed = EXCLUDED.percentage_completed, reading_time_minutes = EXCLUDED.reading_time_minutes, status = EXCLUDED.status, is_favorite = EXCLUDED.is_favorite, notes = EXCLUDED.notes, completed_at = EXCLUDED.completed_at, last_read_at = NOW()
